title: Earthy Crumbly White Masarepa Bake
description: This dairy-free Croatian dish combines fluffy white masarepa with earthy vegetables for a quick-fix meal thats perfect for breakfast or lunch.

ingredients.name: 2 cups of White Masarepa
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought or homemade version

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup grated Parmesan (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added texture, omit if you prefer the crumbly consistency better

ingredients.name: 1 large carrot, finely grated
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with zucchini or any other favorite root veggie

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup diced bell peppers (red or yellow)
2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing and basting the masarepa

instructions: In a large bowl, combine white masarepa with optional grated Parmesan.
Stir in chopped kale, finely grated carrot, and diced bell peppers. Mix well until evenly distributed.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the masarepa mixture and sauté for about 5 minutes or until the masarepa starts to brown slightly on all sides.
Transfer the mixture onto a lightly greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread out evenly to achieve crumbly texture.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste. Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Allow to cool slightly before serving as a side dish, over oatmeal, or wrapped in avocado toast for a hearty breakfast option.
